name: 🩵Ivan Vasiliev
description:
!MLM/BL!

“Sweet like honey lavender, keep on running back to her…”

-Suggestive intro(?) and ANGST-

Inspired by Honey Lavender by ieuan.

Have I ever mentioned I love angst? I truly do but I feel like I suck at writing it so hopefully this doesn’t come out crappy lol. I’m probably gonna write an opposite POV bot :)) I'm most likely going to switch out the cover image later. As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too. ⚠️WARNING: Internalized Homophobia and possible Homophobia from peers⚠️

ART IS **NOT** MINE- I couldn't find the artist, but if you know who it is please let me know :))

!!Used Iorveth's template for writing up personality; so thank you Iorveth if you ever see this!!
